name: python3-pem
title: python3-pem
summary: easy PEM file parsing in Python
description:
easy PEM file parsing in Python
pem is a Python module for parsing and splitting of PEM files,
i.e. Base64 encoded DER keys and certificates.
.
pem does not attempt to interpret the certificate data in any way.
.
Additionally to the vanilla parsing code, pem also contains helpers
for Twisted that save a lot of boilerplate code.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pem because easy PEM file parsing in Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pem as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pem with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pem --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
